titleStmt.title: SII 37.55: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 55. (A.R. No. B 371 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Cuddapah, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: South wall of the Veṅkaṭēśa perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1474 (current), Virōdhikṛit, Āshāḍha śu. 11, corresponding to 1551 A.D., June 14, Sunday.

It records the gift of land by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandēla Avubhaḷēśvarādēva-mahārāju to Sūrapa-Avubhaḷēśvara for maintaining a water shed (chalivindara) on the road leading to Tirumala at the Kōtula-kunṭa channel on the borders of Kaḍapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1474 Agunēṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha
śu 11 lu . śrīrmamahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdēla Avubhaḷēśva
radēva mahārājulayyavāru sūrapa Avubhaḷēśvaruṁgāriki
caliṁdara mānyālaku yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . mīru tiru
mala dōvanu kaḍpa polamēranu kōtulakuṁṭa pā
yalōnu mīru caliviṁdara peṭṭiṁcē Aṁduku
yī caliviṁdarraku nīḷlupōcē cavuḍabōIni
vōbyanaku maddela Appanaku kuṁṭa staḷaṁ na
nu kha 1 . 0 kotta ceruvulōnu ḷa cēnu 2
Apaya cēnu kha 2 pani yedumu cēnu sarrvamānyaṁgā
nu yistimi yiṁdula dharmānaku yavvaru tappinānu
gaṁgakartanu gōbrāhmaṁni vadhiṁcina pāpāna bō
vuvāru tamatallidaṁḍrini vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiṁcina pāpā
nabōvuvāru svadattādviguṇaṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ The inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 37.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
